title: AIDS Creeps Back in Parts of Zambia, a Year After U.S. Cuts to H.I.V. Assistance
summary_full: A once-robust H.I.V. treatment and prevention system, credited with saving hundreds of thousands of lives, has begun to crumble.
summary_public: A once-robust H.I.V. treatment and prevention system, credited with saving hundreds of thousands of lives, has begun to crumble.
